evidence.casual: Uses 'tú/tu' consistently in landing.html ('Controla tu stream', 'tu cara y tus manos', 'tu software de streaming'); informal hero copy 'Sin Stream Deck. Sin atajos memorizados.'
evidence.bold: Hero headline only 5 words split across 2 lines ('Controla tu stream / con un gesto.'); eyebrow declares category leadership 'Nueva categoría · Sin competencia directa'; CSS uses oversized type (clamp 2.4em-5.6em, font-weight 800, letter-spacing -0.04em)
evidence.innovative: Self-positions as gestural control for streaming; README opens with 'Los gestos honestos' tagline; references Esperanto 1887 universal-language attempt and Ekman 1972 as conceptual frame
evidence.expert_lean: Mentions obs-websocket v5, WebGL, Human.js 3.3.6, EventSub WebSocket, Astro WebSocket Gateway, OAuth flows and local bridges — expects technically literate readers (streamers familiar with their stack)
evidence.emotional_lean: Brand tagline 'Los gestos honestos' (honest gestures) is philosophical/emotional; copy variants mention 'cuando el chat va rápido, cada segundo cuenta' and 'sin perder el ritmo en vivo'

colors.evidence: All hex values extracted from :root CSS variables in css/landing.css lines 7-22. Primary is --brand-1 (#58a6ff blue, used in brand-dot-1, aurora-1, gradient stop 0%, focus outline). Secondary --brand-2 (#bc8cff purple, brand-dot-2, aurora-2, gradient 50%, eyebrow tint) and --brand-3 (#ff7b72 coral, aurora-3, gradient 100%). Background --bg (#08090c near-black) and --text (#e6edf3 off-white) define dark-mode base. Gradient: linear-gradient(135deg, #58a6ff 0%, #bc8cff 50%, #ff7b72 100%) is the signature brand expression.

typography.pairing_descriptor: Single-family sans system with Inter as the named choice and system-ui fallback chain (-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI). No @import url(fonts.googleapis.com) found; CSP meta tag (style-src 'self') blocks external font CSS, so Inter renders only when locally installed — otherwise falls back to platform UI font. Headings use font-weight 800 with letter-spacing -0.03em to -0.04em (oversized tight tracking). JetBrains Mono declared for monospace but not visible in landing hero.

imagery.style: mixed (UI dashboard video + abstract gradient mesh + SVG line illustrations)
imagery.composition: Dark cinematic backdrop with floating gradient orbs (aurora-bg with blur 90px, opacity 0.28-0.55, mix-blend-mode screen). Hero showcase wraps a product demo video (EsperantAI-hero.mp4) in a faux browser chrome with traffic-light dots and a 'EN VIVO' indicator. Floating UI badges ('Cara detectada', 'Latencia 42 ms', '100% local') overlay the showcase. Section icons are stroke-only SVG line-art using the brand gradient.
forbidden: cheesy stock photos of people in headsets
fake screen mockups not from the real product

target_audience.profession: live streamers and VTubers on Twitch, YouTube Live, Kick, Trovo who already use OBS/Streamlabs/vMix/PRISM/XSplit and want hands-free control during broadcasts
pain_points: missing live moments while reaching for Stream Deck buttons or memorized hotkeys
breaking broadcast rhythm to switch scenes/overlays manually
privacy concerns about cloud-based AI processing of camera feed
fragmented tooling across streaming software and platform-event sources
aspirations: faster, more intentional reactions to live moments
premium-feeling celebrations for subs/donations without spam
professional studio-grade workflow without extra hardware

positioning.category_claim: Control gestual para streaming con privacidad local y sin hardware adicional
positioning.evidence: Landing and README position EsperantAI as gestural control for streaming, with local video processing and no extra dedicated hardware.

extraction_notes.method: WebFetch of production URL returned HTTP 404; extraction performed from local repo files D:\joel-salazar\OBS\EsperantAI\landing.html (lines 1-200), D:\joel-salazar\OBS\EsperantAI\README.md (full), D:\joel-salazar\OBS\EsperantAI\css\landing.css (lines 1-500), and D:\joel-salazar\OBS\EsperantAI\docs\LANDING_COPY_VARIANTS.md (full). All hex codes, font-family declarations, and copy strings are verbatim from these files. Screenshot capture skipped to save time (per task instruction). Confidence overall: HIGH for colors, typography, layout aesthetic; HIGH for voice positioning (category-creation + privacy values); MEDIUM for emotional/rational axis (brand mixes philosophical/emotional tagline with expert-level technical copy).
